feature.name: Tasks Migration Requirements
feature.description: Document task CRUD, timer operations, and financial record generation for FileMaker to Supabase migration

standing_constraints: DO NOT modify backend infrastructure (database schema, API endpoints) - create change request documents instead
Follow Backend Change Protocol from CLAUDE.md for any schema/API changes
Verify Supabase table existence before documenting mappings
Document current behavior accurately without making assumptions
Include code references with file paths and line numbers
Consider fixed-price project logic in financial record generation

tasks.title: Create requirements directory structure
tasks.description: Create requirements/tasks/ directory and README.md scaffold with sections for task CRUD, timer operations, and financial record generation
tasks.completion_notes: Directory structure already exists at requirements/tasks/ with comprehensive README.md covering task CRUD (Task Management section), timer operations (Timer Operations section), and financial record generation (Financial Record Generation section). All supporting documentation files present: current-implementation.md, data-model-mapping.md, api-contracts.md, authorization.md, migration-plan.md, acceptance-criteria.md. Total 7 files with 140KB of documentation.

tasks.title: Document task CRUD operations
tasks.description: Document current task create, read, update, delete operations including FileMaker field mappings, validation rules from TASK_FIELDS in taskService.js:265-305, and API calls

tasks.title: Document timer lifecycle and state machine
tasks.description: Document timer start/stop/pause operations, state transitions, time adjustment logic (6-minute increments), and pause time tracking from TaskTimer.jsx and taskService.js

tasks.title: Document financial record generation
tasks.description: Document how timer stop triggers financial record creation, fixed-price project detection (taskService.js:108-112), customer_sales insertion, and dual-write orchestration

tasks.title: Map FileMaker devTasks layout to Supabase schema
tasks.description: Verify if Supabase tasks table exists, document FileMaker devTasks field structure, and create mapping to target Supabase schema including field types, constraints, and indexes

tasks.title: Map FileMaker devRecords layout to Supabase schema
tasks.description: Verify if Supabase time_entries table exists, document FileMaker devRecords field structure for timer data, and create mapping to target Supabase schema

tasks.title: Document current dual-write mechanism
tasks.description: Document dualWriteService.js logic, withDualWrite wrapper, timer_stop operation type, and how it coordinates FileMaker + Supabase writes

tasks.title: Document financial sync reconciliation
tasks.description: Document financialSyncService.js synchronization logic, how it compares devRecords with customer_sales, and reconciliation strategies

tasks.title: Define backend API endpoints for tasks
tasks.description: Specify REST API endpoints for task CRUD operations following backend API patterns (HMAC auth, error handling, validation)

tasks.title: Define backend API endpoints for timer operations
tasks.description: Specify REST API endpoints or RPCs for timer start/stop/pause with idempotency requirements, concurrency control, and state validation

tasks.title: Define backend business logic requirements
tasks.description: Specify server-side validation rules, timer state machine enforcement, financial record generation rules, and fixed-price project handling

tasks.title: Create migration strategy document
tasks.description: Document approach for migrating historical tasks and timer records from FileMaker, data transformation requirements, and reconciliation strategy

tasks.title: Define test cases for edge scenarios
tasks.description: Create test cases for timer race conditions (double start/stop), offline/refresh scenarios, partial failure recovery, and concurrent timer operations

tasks.title: Document QuickBooks integration points
tasks.description: Document how billable time from timers flows to QuickBooks invoice generation and what migration means for QB integration

tasks.title: Create backend change request document
tasks.description: Compile all schema changes, API requirements, and backend logic into a formal backend change request document following CLAUDE.md protocol
